title: Student ages
doc_html:
§358. Student ages

            Barber colleges shall not admit as students persons under the age of sixteen years unless the student is enrolled in a board-approved barber college that operates within a state high school, in which case the student may enroll in the barber college as a high school freshman.

            Acts 1964, No. 309, §1. Acts 1984, No. 238, §1; Acts 2024, No. 140, §1.
doc_text:
§358.  Student ages
Barber colleges shall not admit as students persons under the age of sixteen years
unless the student is enrolled in a board-approved barber college that operates within a state
high school, in which case the student may enroll in the barber college as a high school
freshman.
Acts 1964, No. 309, §1.  Acts 1984, No. 238, §1; Acts 2024, No. 140, §1.
